zh.lifeSummary: 當Godith de Lauton於大約1252年出生在英國藍卡爾凱尼恩時，她的父親Richard de Lauton23歲，母親Mrs Richard de Lauton24歲。她和Adam de Kenyon I至少有11個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1340年在英國藍卡爾文維其可享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godith de Lauton于大约1252年出生在英国藍卡爾凱尼恩时，她的父亲Richard de Lauton23岁，母亲Mrs Richard de Lauton24岁。她和Adam de Kenyon I至少有11个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1340年在英国藍卡爾文維其可享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lauton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Pierre, Andre, Gilles, Jacques, Lucien, Michel, Normand, Adelard, Alain, Armand, Damien.

(southeastern): from a diminutive of regional lauze ‘slate’, a word of Gallic origin, used as a metonymic occupational name for a slater or worker in a slate quarry. This surname, in both senses, is very rare in France.

variants.name: Lozon
meanings: Altered form of French   Lauzon   1, which is a variant of 2 below.
French: habitational name from Lozon, a place in Manche. This surname is very rare in France.
Spanish (Lozón): unexplained. This surname is concentrated in Biscay, Basque Country.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Godith de Lauton was born about 1252, in Kenyon, Lancashire, England, her father, Richard de Lauton, was 23 and her mother, Mrs Richard de Lauton, was 24. She had at least 11 sons and 2 daughters with Adam de Kenyon I. She died in 1340, in Winwick, Lancashire, England, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godith de Lauton est née environ 1252, à Kenyon, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Lauton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mrs Richard de Lauton, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 11 fils et 2 filles avec Adam de Kenyon I. Elle est décédée en 1340, à Winwick, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godith de Lauton um 1252 in Kenyon, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Lauton 23 und ihre Mutter Mrs Richard de Lauton 24. Sie hatte mit Adam de Kenyon I mindestens 11 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1340 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Winwick, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godith de Lauton è nata il circa 1252 nel Kenyon, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Richard de Lauton, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Mrs Richard de Lauton, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 11 figli e 2 figlie con Adam de Kenyon I. Morì nel 1340, nel Winwick, Lancashire, England, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Godith de Lautonが約1252年にイギリスランカシュアイアケニーオンで生まれた時，父Richard de Lautonは23歳，母Mrs Richard de Lautonは24歳であった。彼女はAdam de Kenyon Iとの間に少なくとも11人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1340年にイギリスランカシュアイアウィンウィックで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Godith de Lauton(이)가 대략 1252년 영국 랭카실르 켄욘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Lauton(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Richard de Lauton(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Adam de Kenyon I(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 랭카실르 윈윅에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godith de Lauton nasceu aproximadamente 1252, em Kenyon, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Lauton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Richard de Lauton, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 11 filhos e 2 filhas com Adam de Kenyon I. Ela faleceu em 1340, em Winwick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godith de Lauton родилась около 1252 г. в местности кенен, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Lauton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Richard de Lauton, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 2 дочери от Adam de Kenyon I. Она умерла в 1340 г. в местности винвикк, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godith de Lauton nació aproximadamente 1252, en Kenyon, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Lauton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mrs Richard de Lauton, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 11 hijos y 2 hijas con Adam de Kenyon I. Murió en 1340, en Winwick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años.
